name: CubeSmart
summary: Overview We are a self-administered and self-managed real estate company focused primarily on the ownership, operation, development, management, and acquisition of self-storage properties in the United States. The Parent Company was formed in July2004 as a Maryland REIT. The Parent Company owns its assets and conducts its business through the Operating Partnership and its subsidiaries. The Parent Company controls the Operating Partnership as its sole general partner and, as of December 31, 2025,...
